name: Growth readiness re-evaluation after R-8
scoreBoundary: Internal implementation score. Not a Google score and not a ranking prediction.
decision: The renewed Growth evaluation remains NO-GO. Local/source gates pass and browser-rendered public pages have improved, but production still fails release-level HTTP/static/redirect/private-boundary checks and authenticated platform/owner evidence remains unavailable.

liveProductionSeoScore.reason: P0/P1 live blockers cap the usable score.

localSourceFoundationScore.reason: Local source gates, build, static assets, route migration, checkout, i18n, feed, sitemap, and commerce checks pass.

growthReadinessScore.reason: Platform, owner, measurement, production deployment, and business evidence blockers remain.

scorecard.evaluation: Live robots, sitemap, feed, legacy redirects, product ID redirects, private routes, and soft-404s are blocking. Local route/static policies exist.
Rendered browser output works on sampled pages, but raw HTML is still a JavaScript shell with no canonical, links, or schema.
Service/product content systems improved; owner proof for GBP, citations, claims, reviews, policies, and media remains unavailable.
Rendered titles/canonicals improve live samples, but raw direct HTML remains generic and production static assets fail.
Rendered JSON-LD appears on sampled public pages; platform/rich-result validation and owner proof remain unavailable.
Checkout renders as noindex on /checkout and public page browser smoke passed; full accessibility, booking, payment, and field evidence remain incomplete.
i18n, product/feed/sitemap checks pass locally; live feed/sitemap and GBP/Merchant Center evidence block readiness.
Board/report governance is strong; Search Console, analytics, Cloudflare, logs, GBP, Merchant Center, and field performance remain unavailable.

liveFindings: sitemap-products.xml returns text/html instead of XML.
merchant-products.xml returns text/html instead of XML/RSS.
Product UUID URL returns 200 with zero redirects instead of redirecting to the slug URL.
Legacy route samples return 200 with zero redirects.
localPositiveFindings: Local source SEO gates passed: i18n, sitemap, feed, commerce, route migration, checkout, and private route checks.
Local source/build static SEO assets passed; Merchant feed contains 31575 items.
R-8 browser evidence confirms rendered public samples expose route-specific title, H1, canonical, robots, and JSON-LD markers.

blockers.finding: Production static SEO assets and Merchant feed are not deployed correctly.
Public/private boundary remains unsafe at HTTP level.
blockers.verification: Unauthenticated private/admin/account routes return 401, 403, or safe 404 with no private interface rendered.

blockers.finding: Legacy redirects and product identifier redirects are inactive on production.
blockers.verification: Legacy route samples and opaque product identifier URLs permanently redirect one hop to canonical destinations.

blockers.finding: Invalid and noncanonical routes remain HTTP soft-404s.
blockers.verification: Unknown routes return HTTP 404/410; intentional variants redirect to canonical equivalents.

blockers.finding: Authenticated platform, provider, and owner evidence remains unavailable.
blockers.verification: Search Console, Cloudflare, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, logs, field performance, Paytrail, and owner proof are captured with secret-safe envelopes.

nextAction: Resolve production deployment/provider parity blockers before rerunning live evaluation or starting growth scaling.
noGuaranteeBoundary: This evaluation does not guarantee crawling, indexing, selected canonicals, rankings, rich results, local-pack visibility, Merchant Center approval, traffic, conversions, revenue, or AI inclusion.
